title: Type Conversion
text: Type Conversion When assigning, comparing, and evaluating data in variables, fields, parameters, and expressions, it is possible for mismatches in data type to occur. In such cases, Uniface does not generate an error, but implicitly converts the data type from its source type to the target type. To provide more control over type conversion, ProcScript functions can be used to explicitly convert from source to target data type. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
